title: TP With GUI
description: Easy TP with GUI without /tp command.
body:
# TP With GUI

Instead of always having to manually enter the tp command, use the **TP menu by pressing the `K` button** on your keyboard.

Supports both teleporting to the opponent and teleporting the opponent to you.

This mode requires OP or TP authority on the server you wish to use.

## Dependencies

- Fabric API

## Supported Languages

- English
- Korean

## Screenshots
